content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against 26edf3340c5c84297ede274973eeba3b7085ad30, excluding .ralph-burning runtime state. Ran nix develop -c cargo fmt --check and nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub classification_ --lib; both passed.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8285 only skips ApplyFixes for an approved review when validation_follow_ups() is empty, but validation_follow_ups() includes informational_only, covered_by_existing_bead, and propose_new_bead classified findings from lines 8217-8233 even though those classifications are later filtered out of queued amendments. An Approved review that records only deferred or informational classified findings will therefore enter ApplyFixes with nothing current-bead-scoped to fix, violating the no-op/deferred routing contract. Extend the deferred-only skip at lines 8292-8298 to cover Approved reviews when there is no restart-triggering follow-up.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: Prevents informational and non-fix review findings from invoking the current-bead amendment flow.
